unmapped.human_action: If you operate near skin, bodies, or local services, claim the post-weight-loss vocabulary now: a clinic consult, a skincare copy test, or a local provider index, before the category has clean search results.
unmapped.machine_action: Cluster glp1_aesthetics and glp1_skincare_treatments into one maintenance-layer trend, then monitor Reddit, Google Trends rising, and Places operator density for 28 days for a second independent source type.
unmapped.methodology_footer: Foreshore treats one-source proposals as watchlist material until independent source types confirm the movement.

original_issue.thesis: The mature GLP-1 story is the drug; the next business is the maintenance layer that cleans up after rapid weight loss, beginning with skin and aesthetics, where the buyer already has a named problem and the seller still speaks the old vocabulary.
original_issue.uncertainty: Single-source: both proposals came from the same RSS feed cycle, and TikTok trend tooling is down through mid-June, so the consumer-volume side is unobserved.
